brand.name: Northbound
brand.description: Fictional travel brand with a minimalist navy compass-rose identity

logo.prompt: Minimalist navy compass-rose icon, centered on a plain white background, flat vector style, clean geometric lines, deep navy blue (#1B2A4A) petals with thin white separators, no text, no border, logo mark only

mockup.brief: Subway billboard at evening commute, glossy paper, urban setting
